name: foursys-sdd-engine-hybrid-po
description: Motor SDD + Product Owner Agent — Discovery, PRD e User Stories com pipeline business-first.

chatParticipants.name: foursys_sdd_po
chatParticipants.description: Orquestrador SDD + Product Owner Agent: Discovery, PRD, User Stories e skills de suporte.

commands.name: constitution
commands.description: Gera os principios e governanca do projeto para a stack ativa

commands.name: specify
commands.description: Define a especificacao de negocio (User Story)

commands.name: plan
commands.description: Gera o plano de implementacao tecnica para a stack ativa

commands.name: tasks
commands.description: Quebra o plano em tarefas granulares

commands.name: implement
commands.description: Executa a codificacao baseada em tarefas e skills da stack ativa

commands.name: qa-test-plan
commands.description: Gera o Plano de Testes (estrategia e escopo)

commands.name: qa-test-cases
commands.description: Gera Casos de Teste em BDD/Gherkin

commands.name: qa-automation
commands.description: Gera scripts de automacao de testes

commands.name: qa-coverage
commands.description: Realiza review de cobertura de testes

commands.name: qa-report
commands.description: Gera o Relatorio de Qualidade final

commands.name: skill
commands.description: Carrega uma Skill disponivel no HUB

commands.name: po-discovery
commands.description: Inicia o Discovery conversacional com o Product Owner Agent

commands.name: po-prd
commands.description: Refina o negocio e gera o PRD (requer discovery aprovado)

commands.name: po-stories
commands.description: Gera User Stories a partir do PRD aprovado

foursys.modelOverride.markdownDescription: Deixe **vazio** para usar o modelo otimizado por fase. Preencha para forcar um modelo especifico.

foursys.tokenBudget.markdownDescription: Limite de tokens de **entrada** por chamada.

foursys.xrayJiraUrl.description: URL base do Jira com Xray instalado.

foursys.xrayProjectKey.description: Chave do projeto Jira onde os testes serao criados.
